I’m really sorry this took so long to come out, just haven’t felt motivated. I promise it will be taking me over a week to make a bot again unless I’m on break. So sorry again.

I’m not gonna be doing requests, thanks to everyone who sent them in but making a bot that I wanna make it hard enough. Maybe I’ll open them again later.

Also JOIN THE DISCORD!! From now on I plan to do some sort of poll for nearly every bot (pfp, scenario, character, etc.) and I need more people voting!

Thank you guys for sticking with me by the way. You’re all amazing ❤️

Don’t know what I’m gonna do for my next bot, but I’ll think of something.
